figures.caption: Fig. 4. Distribution of solution quality achieved by C-QAOA on the Subsample Small dataset with 3 to 5 nodes. The violins show the approximation ratio distribution over sampled feasible solutions, while the instance labels report the feasible-shot rate.

Fig. 3. Distribution of solution quality achieved by Q-GTSP on the Subsample Medium dataset with 3 to 20 nodes. The violins show the approximation ratio distribution over sampled feasible solutions, while the instance labels report the feasible-shot rate.
